Short CV

She was born in 1990 in İzmir. In 2013,  she graduated from Dokuz Eylül University, Faculty of Fine Arts, Department of Graphics. In 2018,  she received her master's degree from Dokuz Eylül University Institute of Fine Arts. In 2022,  she completed her proficiency in art program at the fine arts institute at the same university. She has won various competitions such as the 2nd Young Contemporary Art Project Competition, Achievement Award, Macedonia International Poster Competition, Special Jury Award. In 2016, she worked as a part-time lecturer at Dokuz Eylül University, and between 2017-2022, she worked as a Research Assistant at Fatih Sultan Mehmet Vakıf University, Faculty of Fine Arts, Department of Graphic Design. Since 2022, She continues her academic studies as an Associate Professor at Üsküdar University, Faculty of Communication, Department of Visual Communication Design.
